text.title: Pair with AI Agent Protocol Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the checklist artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-pair-with-ai-agent-protocol.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

section.title: Schema

example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.
Forbidden traits: missing acceptance_tests; halt_events not recorded; transcript_link absent.
